name: TalentHR
description: Streamline your day-to-day performance management with TalentHR, a fresh-new HRIS. No IT skills required, all at a reasonable price. Learn more about TalentHR

reviews.review_title: A wonderful tool for our company.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: It’s been a wonderful tool for our company. It’s very user-friendly.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use. It’s very user-friendly from both the admin side and the employee side.
reviews.review_cons: Regarding time off, I wish it would show half or quarter days on the calendar

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: It's been really good, and the support team is really helpful and have always sorted any issues.
reviews.review_pros: It's really easy to she and has everything you need. It's also very cost effective for small businesses.
reviews.review_cons: Compared to other software there is some downsides, lack of customisation and it doesn't autoc calculate leave pro rata

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Its a good platform but would like more features to be added in the coming updates
reviews.review_pros: Concise UI where information is easily accessible.
reviews.review_cons: Could have more refined functions such as a more comprehensive leave and off tracking system as well as platform for adding HR policies and maybe a claims system as well

reviews.review_title: TalentHR: an all-round solution for HRBPs
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: TalentHR is easy to navigate. Its features cover most of HR scope, from L&D, to leave management, personnel management, and other HR-related workflows.
reviews.review_pros: Its ability to be integrated into the TalentLMS as well as its full HR function & features. Its free trial is also a sweet point for first-time users.
reviews.review_cons: The cost can be a bit challenge to SMEs. There are HR solutions that offer basic HR functions & features at a lower subscription fee.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It's been really good, one of the best I've experienced. I've been in HR for about 8 years and worked with Oracle mostly, and in Nigeria, we worked with a few African based companies and TalentHR thus far has had the best customer service. Yes there, always room for improvement, but so far so good, and easy to use. So I know my team in Nigeria will have a great time working with TalentHR and have no problem learning the ins and outs.
reviews.review_pros: While looking up HR platforms, I came across TalentHR and saw immediately that they had all aspects of HR for an up-in-coming company and as a HR team of 1. The customer service is really good and respond really quickly. I suggested some items to add or ask for help, along with their HR Assistant which is AI, if I want a live person, I can choose to email them, which also gets a quick response. I'm adventuring into the Recruitment portion and I love how easy it is to navigate and create jobs. Along with finding the candidates and looking at their information. I also love all the helps and "how to's" incorporated into each page to make it fast to learn how to do something.
reviews.review_cons: As mentioned before, in the recruitment portion, I would love to see more automated emails once an employee is moved in the pool or disqualified. But I emailed TalentHR and they already implemented one of my ideas, which as a user, makes me feel great to know they take ideas into consideration to improve their work flow.

reviews.review_title: Excellent HR tool for small consultancy
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years
reviews.review_description: Excellent. We took our time to choose a tool that had most of what we needed and was significantly cheaper than the bigger players.
reviews.review_pros: A simple, reliable HR tool for an SME that does all the key things that you need it to do. Helps to manage the team, skills, leave and feeds into capacity planning for a consulting business.
reviews.review_cons: Some additional functionality would be nice, moving leave, handling retrospective corrections, timesheets maybe?

reviews.review_title: A Solid HR Tool That Makes Daily Tasks Easier
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, TalentHR is easy to use and makes managing HR tasks simple and organized. I found it effective for daily operations, though I’d love to see more flexibility in creating custom admin roles.
reviews.review_pros: I really liked how easy it was to navigate. Everything I needed from requesting time off to updating my personal info was accessible in just a few clicks. It saved me a lot of time compared to traditional HR systems.
reviews.review_cons: One area that could be improved in TalentHR is role customization. Currently, only the Owner and HR Manager roles can act as administrators, which limits flexibility. Adding the option to create company-specific admin roles with custom permissions would make the system much more adaptable.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: As I said it has been a great tool in my school, my teachers know exactly where to go when they need help. and the way we manage the PTO is fantastic, now I can delegate and Just approve. thanks HR!
reviews.review_pros: My staff works smoothly trough the App everything is easy very accurate very reliable The way it covers all my office assessments.
reviews.review_cons: Non, I have to say that everything works perfectly with this app, at first my employees found it a little difficult regarding going to the process of registering, but after few minutes they were using it without a problem.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Everything works well for our organization using your platform. We just haven’t fully utilized all of its functions yet, but we’ll review again once we’ve explored the platform more completely.
reviews.review_pros: It’s easy to monitor and track our employees, and it’s very helpful for creating job postings and managing candidates from application to interview.
reviews.review_cons: So far, we haven’t encountered any major issues. The only challenge is that we haven’t had the chance to fully explore and use all of the platform’s features yet. In the future, there might also be some difficulty in scaling for larger organizations.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience is wonderful. Quick, easy, and simple to navigate the portal. I would recommend this to businesses.
reviews.review_pros: This is a fantastic program for small to medium businesses. It is a quick and seamless way to track PTO for staff members.
reviews.review_cons: I do not have many cons for this program. I use it to track PTO for my staff. It's easy for both them and me to manage,

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Easy and Good UI, and reasonable price. Especially, Under 5 people company can use all functions with no charge. It is free.
reviews.review_pros: Easy UI, Admin can setup the vacation days and sick days of each employee. When employees need an approval from their manager, Approval procedure follows the Organization chart which Admin set up initially.
reviews.review_cons: Needs a function about the clock in & clock out. Basic information needs the Wedding Anniversary of employees.

reviews.review_title: Excellent Platform to keep everything organized
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with TalentHR has been positive. It’s an efficient platform that simplifies HR processes and enhances productivity. While there’s room for improvement in customization, it’s a reliable tool for managing HR tasks effectively.
reviews.review_pros: TalentHR is user-friendly, efficient, and streamlines HR processes seamlessly.
reviews.review_cons: Some features could be more customizable.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It's been very easy to use and implement and fits our needs without paying hundreds for other tools that do the exact same thing with maybe a few more bells and whistles.
reviews.review_pros: It's so impressive how much value TalentHR provides with their free version. The org chart and PTO manager and the customizations are just what we needed.
reviews.review_cons: It'd be great if they added a way to track equipment like computers, phones, etc w/ the free version.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: Good product, easy to use, integration with talentlms
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, integrations, reporting, talent pool
reviews.review_cons: Job posting and related reporting need improvement

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Organizational Chart Time Off Organized System for employees
reviews.review_cons: No time tracking system (though they say it’s in the works) Once our employees are able to clock in and out from the same system as they request time off, it will be 10/10. Would also love if they came up with an in house payroll system

reviews.review_title: An excellent tool to manage your workforce!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: TalentHR is an excellent tool for an HR manager, you can go from your 1000 Excel sheets to this HRMS and have all the information you need together.
reviews.review_pros: It is very detailed and offers a lot of customization, to tailor it to your needs. The UI is amazing! Reporting and analytics are great.
reviews.review_cons: Vacations/Time off on calendar view. I would like the option to export in xlx/csv form (if there is one forgive me I haven't found it). Also I would like the days to be visible inside the bars somehow, without the need to mouse over.

reviews.review_title: At last, a no frills software for small to medium startups
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience was very positive, you can't ask much more from a free software! For a small team of our size (around 20 employees) I think you will not find a better value for money solution.
reviews.review_pros: TalentHR is very easy to use, simple to setup and maintain, and has all the basic features we need
reviews.review_cons: Migrating our data was not very easy but I know they're working on it. Some features we'd like are still missing (custom fields, delete duplicate employee without affecting charts, second email for each employee, etc) but the team is very responsive to suggestions and have added these to their roadmap.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: It's an easy to use, user-friendly system that can be introduced seamlessly into an organization.
reviews.review_cons: I think some minor improvements can be made around customization of features and allowing for more integrations with other third-party software.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: The HR application I reviewed is impressively user-friendly and visually appealing. It offers an intuitive interface, a welcoming design, and a modern aesthetic. It sets a high standard for usability and aesthetics in the HR software industry.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, integration with TalentLMS, modern look.
reviews.review_cons: Based on my assessment, it appears that application has room for further enhancements. Expanding the application's capabilities would greatly contribute to its overall functionality and value for HR professionals and organizations.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I'm extremely satisfied overall. Glad we chose TalentHR
reviews.review_pros: I love how easy it is to track and keep up with our employee's vacations and days off.
reviews.review_cons: The reports could be better. Wish there was more info.

reviews.author_profession: Head of Talent Acquisition and HR development
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and implement but haven’t tried in yet on a full HR cycle
reviews.review_cons: I canot tell yet. Must try it all year to see if it meets HR requirements

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed navigating the system and being able to create some custom flows. Overall, I was very pleased and would recommend them to others.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate the user-friendliness of the system, the value for the money, and the fact that customer support is readily available. Straight-forward pricing is always a plus in my eyes and I really appreciated that they were willing to give me an extended trial run with the system without requiring any upfront payments.
reviews.review_cons: Although the system is user-friendly, it does certainly have a learning curve, especially if you are used to another system. But again, the support that is available makes that less of a con.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The customer support team is helpful. There are a handful of features that are helpful for smaller non-profit businesses.
reviews.review_cons: The pricing could be more competitive/lower to accommodate business (nonprofits) that are start up and don't have state /grant funding.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: Amazing, I like that we have an HR Administrator who handles HR duties and can make tasks available for them and the staff, as we use student interns, and they learn fast.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate the ability to upload documents, such as the Basic Conditions of Employment Act, for staff access. This ensures they can review their workplace rights anytime, even via the mobile app.
reviews.review_cons: We are using the free version. So I think the platform should be made available fully for small businesses with fewer than ten staff members. We are a small organisation, and having access to all the features would be great, then a growth upgrade.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: Used this app for more than a year now and besides some minor things it provides all we need in a modern style and intuitive frontend.
reviews.review_pros: Clean, intuitive and flexible applicaiton that makes fun using.
reviews.review_cons: SSO would be an advantage, but I think in another paid plan it is avaialble.
